urdu transliteration text: Aaj-Ki, Shab Sey, Lahed Hey Aur, Zehra Ya-Ali
english translation text: From Tonight Onwards it is the grave and Zahra, Ya-Ali

urdu transliteration text: Kutch, Wasiyat, Karti Hu, Suunlijiyega Ya-Ali
english translation text: I am going to read my will so lend me your ear, Ya-Ali

urdu transliteration text: Koyi, Dushman, Dinka, Aaye, Na, Mayat Par Meri
english translation text: Do not let an enemy come to my Mayyit

urdu transliteration text:
Aur-Nikle Raat Ko Janaaza Ya-Ali
Conduct my funeral in the Dark, Ya-Ali
Is Tarha Baba Ki, Ummat Ne Diya Pursa Mujhe
english translation text: Oh how my fathers Followers Consoled me

urdu transliteration text:
Fatema, Ka Hog Haya Chalni Kaleja
Ya-Ali
Fatema’s heart was torn,
Ya-Ali
Mere Naalo Sey Jo The, Bezaar Kehdijiye Un He
english translation text: Those who were disturbed by my mourning, tell them

urdu transliteration text:
Khatma Hey Bas Aaj Sey, Zahra Ka Rona Ya-Ali
Zahras crying has ended today,
Ya-Ali
Ay Mere Sar-Taj Har Dam Rakhiyega Unka Khayaal
english translation text: O My Master always care for them

urdu transliteration text: Meline Bachoko Mushaqat Sey Hey Paala Ya-Ali
english translation text: I have raised the children with great difficulty, Ya-Ali

urdu transliteration text: Qabra, Mey Raoungi, Bache Mere Jo Raoenge
english translation text: I will weep in my grave when my children cry

urdu transliteration text:
Waaste, Mere Na Unko, Rone Dena Ya-Ali
Ya-Ali
english translation text: For my sake, do not let them cry,
